verse_text: For we hear that there are some who walk among you in a disorderly manner, not working at all, but are busybodies.

links.context: Jacob's sons were lazy, and lazy people are unruly ([[2TH.3:6]]-12). Such people lack reverence, lack self-control in speech, and are quick to abuse others (JohnCas). These sinful passions characterized Jacob's sons when they sold Joseph into Egypt.

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
